context.text: Petra is a historical city in Jordan.

context.title: Jordan
context.text: Jordan borders the Dead Sea to the west.

question: Which language family does the primary language of Brazil belong to?

context.title: Brazil
context.text: The official language of Brazil is Portuguese.

context.title: Portuguese language
context.text: Portuguese is a Romance language.

question: Which mountain range contains the highest mountain in the country whose capital is Kathmandu?

context.title: Kathmandu
context.text: Kathmandu is the capital city of Nepal.

context.title: Nepal
context.text: Mount Everest, the highest mountain in Nepal, is part of the Himalayas.
